title: The Journey Starts Swiftly
content:
A thousand times ten thousand times
        More swift than the sun's swift light
        Were the Morning Wings in their flight
        On -    On - 
        West of the Universe,
        Thro' the West
        To Chaos-night.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Vachel Lindsay delivers a powerful performance in "The Journey Starts Swiftly"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
